title: Attribute Swap Fixer
description: This plugin enables attribute swapping on paper severs
body:
This plugin enables attribute swapping on paper

What does the plugin fix

* Spear lunge swap
* Spear reach swap
* Mace breach swap
* Mace swap
* Mace stun slam
* Axe shield stun

**THIS PLUGIN HAS ONLY BEEN TESTED IN PAPER 1.21.11, IT MIGHT WORK ON OTHER VERSIONS THO**

Installation Guide

1- Download the plugin

2- Put the .jar on your server´s plugins file

3- Restart server **TWICE**, **IF YOU DO NOT RESTART THE SERVER TWICE ON FIRST INSTALATION IT WILL NOT WORK!**

**If you have detected another version that this plugin works on contact me on discord to update the description of the plugin
@iamzephyr__**

**This plugin will most likely not be updated for older/newer versions as this wasnt even meant to be released. If i see a lot of downloads i might update it to newer/older versions**
